description_long: This is a small, plump bird with a rounded body and a short tail. Its breast and face are a vibrant orange, blending into a lighter grayish-white belly and underparts. The wings and back are a rich brown, with subtle feather detailing visible along the back and sides. The beak is short and straight, colored in a dark shade, and the legs are thin and black. The eyes are round and dark, giving the bird a lively and alert expression. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a European Robin, commonly seen in urban parks and gardens.
description: A small, round-bodied bird with an orange breast, brown wings and back, and a short tail, resembling a European Robin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange breast, face, and symmetrical rounded body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the brown wings, orange face, and short tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the brown back and tail feathers with subtle feather patterning.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the orange face, brown wings, and short tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid orange face and breast, brown back and wings, grayish-white belly, subtle feather detailing on back.
